creator: cris@gufi.org
text:
On Tuesday 26 December 2006 17:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of security/expiretable,
>
> Please note that PR ports/107208 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107208

Yes, the patch can be submitted.
Thanks.

-- 
Cristiano Deana - FreeCRIS
"Ho iniziato a usare FreeBSD perche' m$ usava me. ed e' spiacevole"
[cris|crs] in irc su: irc.azzurra.org #freebsd-it #qmail-it
